# PIA

PIA replaces manual follow-up and coordination
in distributed operations without human intervention.

## What PIA does

Teams interact via WhatsApp. PIA creates tasks from
voice notes and messages, assigns owners, activates
automatic follow-up, escalates delays with full context,
and generates real-time operational metrics.

No new apps. No forms. No manual entry.

## Facts

- 185,000+ interactions operated without human intervention
- 8 countries in Latin America
- ISO 27001 certified
- 30 days to first operational impact

## Links

- Website: [soypia.com](https://soypia.com)
- Contact: [WhatsApp](https://wa.me/50672527122)
